bets.match: Miami Heat vs Los Angeles Lakers

cancelled.reason: New information fundamentally changes the edge. Scout's entire thesis was anchored on Franz Wagner (Orlando franchise player) being OUT. At commit time, Wagner does NOT appear on the official NBA injury report — only Anthony Black (OUT) and Wendell Carter Jr. (OUT, new) are listed for Orlando. Jonathan Isaac is also absent from the official report. Without confirmed Wagner absence, the franchise player edge that justified the pick evaporates entirely. Additionally, Jonathan Isaac's status is unconfirmed. The core rationale — covering -5.5 on road without their best player — no longer applies if Wagner is active. Cancel per cancel_criteria: 'New information fundamentally changes the edge.'
